extraction.one_line_summary: IMPEY Daryl won from a reduced bunch sprint after BERWICK Sebastian's late attack failed on the final climb.
tactical_patterns: EF Education kept breakaway under 90 seconds entire stage to engineer reduced bunch sprint for their climber-sprinter.
BERWICK Sebastian attacked immediately after final climb crest when pure sprinters were distanced, exploiting transition moment.
WILLIAMS Stephen deliberately conserved energy on climb then timed chase effort to rejoin as attacks neutralized.

rider_signals.BERWICK Sebastian: positive: strong enough to attack solo after final climb when faster sprinters dropped
rider_signals.WILLIAMS Stephen: positive: tactical maturity to pace distancing on climb and time bridging effort perfectly
